summary: Iter 45 — P3 testing for 4 new features: (1) Digest Settings (GET/PUT /api/digest/settings + per-org day/hour scheduling), (2) Wanted Cars CRUD + match engine, (3) Installments Overdue list, (4) Stock Aging stats. Backend pytest: 11/11 PASS (digest settings admin/satis 403, PUT persists day=fri/hour=18; wanted-cars create with match_count, list, matches/{id}, matches-for-car/{car_id}, soft-delete; installments/overdue/list rows+totals shape; stats/stock-aging rows/buckets/totals shape). APScheduler startup log 'Digest scheduler started (hourly tick, per-org day/hour)' confirmed in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log. Frontend Playwright: Sidebar nav-wanted-cars/nav-stock-aging/nav-receivables PRESENT. WantedCarsPage: wanted-add-btn opens modal with wanted-form-customer + wanted-form-submit. StockAgingPage: aging-buckets + aging-table PRESENT. ReceivablesPage: summary-overdue + filter-all/overdue/upcoming PRESENT (table only renders when data exists — currently empty state shown, expected). Settings DigestPanel: digest-enabled-toggle + digest-day-select(SELECT) + digest-hour-select(SELECT) + digest-save-settings-btn PRESENT; selecting day=fri+hour=18 and clicking save fires PUT /api/digest/settings with body {"enabled":true,"day":"fri","hour":18} (verified via request interception); toast.success wired in code.

issues: DialogContent missing aria-describedby — Radix accessibility warning. Non-blocking but should add Description for a11y.
receivables-table testid only renders when filtered.length>0; empty state shows text message. Acceptable, but consider always rendering table with empty <tbody> for selector consistency.

passed_tests: GET /api/digest/settings admin → 200 {enabled, day, hour, recipient, timezone}
PUT /api/digest/settings {enabled:true, day:'fri', hour:18} → 200 + persists (verified via subsequent GET)
GET /api/wanted-cars → list with match_count per item

GET /api/installments/overdue/list → {rows[{installment_id, customer_name, per_term_amount, paid_amount, expected_paid, overdue_amount, remaining_amount, days_overdue, is_overdue}], totals{overdue_count, overdue_amount, upcoming_count, total_remaining}}
GET /api/stats/stock-aging → {rows[{plate, brand, model, days_in_stock, daily_cost, accumulated_cost, is_stale}], buckets{0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 91+}, totals}
Frontend sidebar shows nav-wanted-cars + nav-stock-aging + nav-receivables for admin
DigestPanel saves day=fri+hour=18 → fires correct PUT body and toast.success wired
action_items: OPTIONAL (a11y): Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to WantedCarsPage modal DialogContent (Radix warning).
OPTIONAL (UX): Render <table data-testid='receivables-table'> always, with empty <tbody> message inside, so selector is stable when no rows. Currently selector missing on empty data.
Existing minor finding from iter44 still open: DigestPanel axios error toast on /preview has no detail (line ~80) — already noted. Fixed-in-iter44 'crm_token' key still used correctly here.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/wanted_cars.py:111 — _count_matches_for_request loops cars per item in list_wanted (N+1 over org cars). For an org with 1000 wanted+5000 cars, this is 5M iterations per /api/wanted-cars GET. Consider: fetch cars ONCE outside loop and pass to helper, or aggregate inside MongoDB.

routes/wanted_cars.py:50 _car_matches_request — case-insensitive substring match for brand/model is loose; e.g. 'Audi' would also match 'audio'. Consider whole-word/exact match by default with optional 'fuzzy=true' flag.
routes/digest.py:218 — admins query loads ALL admins each tick (hourly). Add DB index on {role:1, digest_enabled:1} OR run only if enabled=true at query level.
routes/installments.py:155 (overdue list) — _enrich runs per installment with separate DB query per item (N+1). Pre-fetch transactions grouped by installment_id like stats.py:73 does for cars.

routes/installments.py:190 months_passed calculation has off-by-one risk: '(today.day >= start_date.day)' counts current month as paid even if today.day == start_date.day exactly — usually correct, but if start_date.day=31 and today is 30th of next month, will mistakenly skip. Consider relativedelta from python-dateutil.
routes/stats.py:241 stock-aging — yearly_rate default 18% hardcoded; reads owner.stock_cost_yearly_pct but no PUT endpoint exposed to set this. Add admin settings endpoint or document how to update.
ReceivablesPage.jsx:86 — table only rendered when filtered.length>0 makes data-testid unstable for selectors; render empty <tbody> with placeholder row instead.
WantedCarsPage modal raises Radix DialogContent aria-describedby warning — add <DialogDescription> for a11y.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter45_p3.py (NEW — 11 pytest tests covering all 4 P3 features)
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_WantedCust_<uuid> customer created+torn down inside fixture; one wanted_car created+soft-deleted; ephemeral TEST_satis_<uuid> sub-user for 403 test created+deleted. Digest settings reset to default {mon, 9, enabled:true} at end of test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 45 P3 backlog (digest settings UI, wanted cars, receivables, stock aging) fully validated end-to-end. Reusable regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter45_p3.py (export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL before pytest). Note: receivables-table data-testid only renders when there is at least one installment in DB; create one for full UI assertions if needed. Wanted cars match engine uses substring case-insensitive match — be aware in test data setup.
